user.title: Add Raylogic MOD2U
user.description: Device ka IP address daalo. Har channel ka type wahi chuno jo aapne Raylogic GO app mein (Select Type screen) set kiya hai - device khud apna type nahi batata. Area wahi daalo jo Mod Settings screen mein dikhta hai (e.g. 12). Area = 0 sirf tab chalega jab dono channel 'relay' ho (HA khud seekh lega app/switch se ek baar toggle karke) - Dimmer/Fan/Curtain ke liye Area zaroor manually dena hoga.

data.channel_start: First Channel Number (usually 1, but check Raylogic GO app if channels aren't 1-2)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check IP address and ensure device is powered on.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.
error.area_required_for_non_relay: Dimmer/Fan/Curtain channels ke liye Area (0 nahi) manually dena zaroori hai - auto-learn sirf Relay ke liye kaam karta hai.

abort.already_configured: This Raylogic MOD2U device is already configured.

init.title: Configure Raylogic MOD2U
init.description: Channel type (relay/dimmer/fan/curtain), Area, ya channel numbering yahan se badlo - device delete karne ki zaroorat nahi.

error.area_required_for_non_relay: Dimmer/Fan/Curtain ke liye Area manually dena zaroori hai (0 sirf Relay LEARN mode ke liye chalta hai).
